---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem clearly and concisely.

Example:
I am frustrated when `...` because `...`

## Describe the solution you would like

Describe clearly what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you have considered

List any alternative solutions, workarounds, or related ideas you have considered.

## Affected area

Specify the part of the project this request relates to, for example:

- API endpoint behavior
- search / filtering / pagination
- SSE events
- webhook system
- authentication / authorization
- caching / performance
- OpenAPI documentation
- developer experience / setup

## Proposed API or behavior changes

If applicable, describe:

- new endpoint(s)
- request/response changes
- new query parameters
- new environment variables
- new event types
- backward compatibility concerns

## Use case

Explain who benefits from this feature and how it would be used in practice.

## Expected benefit

Describe the value of this feature, for example:

- improves usability
- reduces integration effort
- exposes missing data
- improves performance
- improves observability
- reduces maintenance effort

## Additional context

Add any other context, examples, mock requests, or references here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] This is a feature request, not a bug report
- [ ] I explained the use case clearly
- [ ] I considered possible compatibility or implementation impact
